subcodes.first_line: O thou bird, soaring on wings of certitude in the atmosphere of inner meaning and utterance, adorned with the ornament of wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الطائر بقوادم الایقان فی هوآء المعانی و البیان و المطرز بطراز الحکمه
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of prayer, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
